tagline: Autonomous multi-agent financial research with MOASS detection and scheduled scanning
description: Dexter is a Streamlit-based autonomous financial research agent using a 4-agent architecture. It accepts complex financial queries, decomposes them into structured tasks, executes them with real-time market data from multiple providers, validates quality iteratively, and synthesizes comprehensive answers. Features include TTM Squeeze detection, MOASS scanner, institutional options flow, scheduled eagle-eye scans, and Discord alerts.

agent_architecture.name: Planning Agent
agent_architecture.role: Analyzes queries and creates structured task plans

agent_architecture.name: Action Agent
agent_architecture.role: Executes individual tasks using financial data tools with multi-source fallback

agent_architecture.name: Validation Agent
agent_architecture.role: Checks task completion quality and data sufficiency

agent_architecture.name: Answer Agent
agent_architecture.role: Synthesizes findings into comprehensive, data-backed responses

scanners.name: TTM Squeeze Detection
scanners.description: Bollinger Bands inside Keltner Channels — identifies explosive move setups

scanners.name: MOASS Scanner
scanners.description: Mother Of All Short Squeeze candidates — volume surge, gamma potential, squeeze setup scoring

scanners.name: Penny Stock Scanner
scanners.description: High-potential penny stocks with squeeze metrics and price levels

scanners.name: Bullish Pattern Detection
scanners.description: Double bottom, cup & handle, ascending triangle, bull flag, golden cross, inverse H&S

scanners.name: Bearish Pattern Detection
scanners.description: Double top, head & shoulders, descending triangle, bear flag, death cross

scanners.name: Options Flow Scanner
scanners.description: Unusual options activity via volume/OI ratios, IV, calculated Greeks (yfinance)

scheduled_scanning.eagle_eyes: 7:00 AM EST and 3:05 PM EST — comprehensive market analysis
scheduled_scanning.regular: Every 2 hours (9 AM, 11 AM, 1 PM EST) — continuous monitoring
scheduled_scanning.alerts: Discord webhooks with rich embeds including buy/sell/stop-loss price levels

trading_recommendations.buy_price: Based on recent swing lows and support
trading_recommendations.sell_target: Based on resistance levels and 2.5:1 minimum risk/reward

ai_providers.gemini: FREE — recommended for zero-cost usage (Google AI Studio)

export.pdf: Formatted research report with tables and statistics
export.discord: Rich embed webhooks with all price levels

persistence: PostgreSQL — conversation history, query templates, scan results with full-text search
deployment: Streamlit on port 5000: streamlit run app.py --server.port 5000
example_queries: What was Apple's revenue growth over the last 4 quarters?
Find the top 10 penny stocks with the most squeeze potential today
Show me stocks in a TTM Squeeze setup with Bollinger Bands inside Keltner Channels
Find MOASS candidates — stocks with volume surge, gamma potential, and squeeze setups
Which stocks have unusual options flow and high gamma squeeze potential?
